Title: View Employee Profile
Expected Result: Employee profile details are displayed accurately
Steps: Login to the system | Navigate to Employee Profile section | View employee details

Title: Update Employee Profile
Expected Result: Employee profile details are updated successfully
Steps: Login to the system | Navigate to Employee Profile section | Click on edit button | Update employee details | Click save button
